reasoning: After reviewing the full order detail page and the Comments History, there is no staff note or internal comment addressing a non-delivery claim. The only existing internal note discusses a prior, unrelated bundle refund scenario and does not apply to this order (single item, already shipped and marked complete). There is also no delivery confirmation, tracking evidence, or investigation note documented regarding the customer's claim that the package was never delivered. Due to the discrepancy between the customer's claim and the current order status (Shipped/Complete) and the lack of relevant internal context, this refund request requires escalation for delivery verification (carrier check, tracking, proof of delivery) before a refund decision can be made.
